CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2016 Set For Trial On Sep-06-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Compel: 1. Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents 2. Plaintiff Roger Ocon To Attend And Testify At Deposition And Produce For Inspection Documents And Or Tangible Things At Deposition 3. For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Having read and considered the motion, including the memorandum of points and authorities, all timely submitted admissible evidence, IT IS ORDERED THAT Defendant Alberto Roger Ocon's Motion to Compel Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents, and Plaintiff Roger Ocon To Attend And Testify At Deposition And Produce For Inspection Documents And Or Tangible Things At Deposition is GRANTED. Defendant's request for sanctions is GRANTED. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order for the Court's signature. Judge Pro Tem: Naomi Gray, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
